heading: Definitions
label: 16531 Definitions
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in introductory provisions, was in the original “this title”, meaning title V of , , , known as the Protecting America’s Competitive Edge Through Energy Act and also as the PACE–Energy Act, which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of this title to the Code, see Short Title of 2007 Amendment note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 110–69121 Stat. 600section 15801 of this titleAug. 9, 2007

children.heading: Department
children.label: 1 Department
children.text: The term “Department” means the Department of Energy.

children.heading: Institution of higher education
children.label: 2 Institution of higher education
children.text: The term “institution of higher education” has the meaning given the term in .section 1001(a) of title 20

children.heading: National Laboratory
children.label: 3 National Laboratory
children.text: The term “National Laboratory” has the meaning given the term in .section 15801 of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 4 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Energy.
